# WhisperFrame

> AI-powered video processing toolkit with OpenAI Whisper transcription and intelligent frame extraction.

## Overview

WhisperFrame uses OpenAI Whisper to transcribe spoken content from videos and extracts video frames at meaningful moments, enabling automated video analysis and content creation workflows.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/cocodedk/whisperframe
- Website (EN): https://cocodedk.github.io/whisperframe/
- Website (FA): https://cocodedk.github.io/whisperframe/fa/
- Download: https://github.com/cocodedk/whisperframe/releases/latest/download/whisperframe.zip
- Author: https://cocode.dk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/babakbandpey

## Technical Details

- Language: Python 3.12
- AI: OpenAI Whisper
- Dependencies: See requirements.txt
- License: Apache-2.0

## Key Files

- `video_transcriber.py` — Whisper-based transcription
- `video_frame_extractor.py` — Frame extraction logic
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI session instructions
